overallLength.uncertainty: Seller notes manual measurement may differ by 10-30 mm.

overallWidth.uncertainty: Seller notes manual measurement may differ by 10-30 mm.

publishedMass.uncertainty: Unknown whether value is per hook or per two-piece set.

sellerClaimedMaximumLoad.uncertainty: Surface, dwell time, duration and safety factor unknown.

measurementProtocol: Use calipers with at least 0.1 mm resolution for rigid dimensions.
Measure three samples and retain each raw value rather than only an average.
Measure adhesive thickness before and after removal without compressing foam.
Weigh one bare body, adhesive material and complete hook separately where possible.
Photograph each measurement with the instrument display and measured feature visible.
